_comment: Presence Engine room mapping. 'rooms' defines each room's sensor type + linger (how long the room stays 'occupied' after the last positive signal). 'devices' maps each Zigbee2MQTT friendly_name to a room — fill these in with the ACTUAL friendly names you give each sensor when pairing (see docs/presence-setup.md). Hot-reloaded on save. mmwave (FP300) reports stillness so uses a short linger; pir (SNZB-03PR2) uses a longer one so lights don't drop between re-triggers. Room names must match LIGHT_ROOM in scripts/lights_optimizer.py.
